creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

caja spams glib errors into the xsession logs which do make them grow fastly.

I do have cherry picked an patch from https://github.com/mate-desktop/caja/commit/488885550e472c30eea2308d2f27be633cb69bcc and can conform that the problem is solved with that.

Discussion about that issue: https://github.com/mate-desktop/caja/issues/1704.
